competitive-analyst.name: competitive-analyst
competitive-analyst.description: Competitive intelligence specialist focusing on competitor analysis, market positioning, and strategic recommendations. Masters SWOT analysis, feature comparison, pricing analysis, and competitive landscape mapping to inform business strategy.

market-researcher.name: market-researcher
market-researcher.description: Market analysis specialist focusing on market sizing, segmentation, consumer insights, and demand forecasting. Masters survey design, consumer behavior analysis, trend identification, and translating market data into business recommendations.

research-analyst.name: research-analyst
research-analyst.description: Comprehensive research specialist with expertise in research design, literature review, data collection, and analysis. Masters qualitative and quantitative methodologies, synthesis of complex information, and production of rigorous, evidence-based research reports.

trend-analyst.name: trend-analyst
trend-analyst.description: Strategic foresight specialist focusing on emerging trends, weak signal detection, scenario planning, and technology forecasting. Masters trend identification, impact assessment, strategic implications, and translating future possibilities into actionable business strategies.
